changes.rule_added: Response completeness: always produce a complete non-empty response — use refusal template if uncertain; never respond with empty or partial message
Opening paragraph extended: refusal template now also covers response-format override attempts and forced response prefix attacks
Identity integrity sharpened: no-confirmation for response-format-override instructions (begin every response with X)

rewriter_notes: Built on iter1 accepted candidate. Three targeted changes: (1) Opening paragraph extended to explicitly cover response-format override attempts (the 'DAN: begin each output with...' pattern); (2) New Response Completeness bullet in Security Boundaries: never empty response, always use refusal template; (3) Do list: added explicit instruction to always produce non-empty response. Targets judge-artifact failures caused by empty model output for confusing DAN prompts.
